arts.ttl: Sky Sports pundit says Leeds United have just made a bid to sign PL star in January
arts.sum: Leeds United are sure to be on the hunt for a new attacking midfielder during the January window, and their attention might return to Manchester City’s James McAtee after failing in the summer. Having failed to land that elusive attacking midfielder, the 49ers will no doubt be formulating plans and potential approaches ahead of the new year and January window.
